title: The Wedding
content:
A year later, Yan Long and Lin Xue decided to get married.

The wedding was a grand event, with dragons and humans from all over the kingdom in attendance.

Yan Long wore a golden dragon suit, and Lin Xue wore a beautiful white dress.

As they stood at the altar, Yan Long looked at Lin Xue, and he knew that he had made the best decision of his life.

"I love you, Lin Xue," Yan Long said.

"I love you too, Yan Long," Lin Xue said.

They kissed, and the crowd cheered.

***

After the wedding, Yan Long and Lin Xue went on a honeymoon. They traveled to the Dragon Council's headquarters, where they spent weeks exploring and learning.

"This is amazing," Lin Xue said, looking at the dragons.

Yan Long smiled. "I'm glad you like it."

He took her hand. "And I'm glad you're here with me."

***

When they returned to the palace, Yan Long was named the Emperor. He would rule the Yan Kingdom with wisdom and compassion.

"People of the Yan Kingdom," Yan Long said, standing on the palace steps.

"I promise to rule with fairness and justice, and I will protect this kingdom with my life."

The crowd cheered, and Lin Xue stood by his side, smiling.

***

That night, Yan Long and Lin Xue sat on the palace roof, looking at the stars.

"Yan Long," Lin Xue said.

"Hmm?"

"I'm happy," Lin Xue said. "I'm so happy."

Yan Long smiled. "Me too."

He put his arm around her, and they watched the stars together.

For a moment, everything felt perfect.

And Yan Long knew that this was just the beginning.

The dragon prince had become the emperor, and he was ready to rule.

The end... for now.
